_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in translating a business question into a data query, identifying the correct data sources, joins, filters, and aggregations required to answer the question accurately.
comments: NICE skill intersects with WIDAI AB domain. Skill AB-S-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-010 (TF, cosine: 0.634), TF-K-001 (TF, cosine: 0.611).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.9/10 (raw 0.689). Shared vocabulary: [data, skill]. NICE-only terms [querying] vs WIDAI-only terms [accurately, aggregations, answer, business, correct, filters] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.883 (P=0.917, R=0.852). P exceeds R by 0.066 — the NICE element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Skill in querying data" and "Skill in translating a business question into a data query, identifying the corr" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.662 ≈ STS 0.689 (gap 0.027). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.6%. Shared tokens: [data, skill]. NICE-only: [querying]. WIDAI-only: [accurately, aggregations, answer, business, correct, filters].
